what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG icon showing a cloud outline with a downward arrow beneath it, drawn with themeable stroked paths.
observations: Root SVG uses viewBox 0 0 24 24 with no explicit width or height.
The icon uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" for inherited color styling.
Stroke styling is set to 1.5 width with round line caps and joins.
The graphic is built from two path elements: one for the cloud outline and one for the vertical download arrow.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions with no fill, rounded strokes, and a 24x24 viewBox.
Uses inline SVG path data without metadata, title, or accessibility labels.
Omits fixed dimensions so sizing can be controlled externally.
notes: A file-local SVG asset for a cloud download icon using inherited stroke color.
questions: Should this icon include an accessible title or aria attributes when embedded directly?
purpose_vs_actual: The file path and filename indicate a cloud-down icon, and the SVG content depicts a cloud with a downward arrow.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable, scalable cloud download icon that can adapt to surrounding text or UI color.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable cloud download glyph suitable for representing cloud-based download or retrieval actions in an icon set.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 outline SVG cloud download icon made from two currentColor stroked paths.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable cloud-down/download icon asset within a design system.
